nodes.name: object_address.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for pg_get_object_address and related functions, verifying object identification by type and address across all catalog object kinds.

nodes.name: oid.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the oid data type and oid-based types (regclass, regproc, etc.), covering parsing and catalog lookups.

nodes.name: oidjoins.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for OID join integrity, verifying that foreign-key OID references in system catalogs point to valid entries.

nodes.name: opr_sanity.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL catalog sanity test for operators, verifying operator definitions, commutators, negators, and related function consistency.

nodes.name: partition_aggregate.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for aggregate operations on partitioned tables, verifying partial aggregation and partition-wise aggregate planning.

nodes.name: partition_info.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for partition information functions, covering pg_partition_tree, pg_partition_ancestors, and partition metadata queries.

nodes.name: partition_join.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for partition-wise join planning, verifying that joins on co-partitioned tables use efficient partition-wise join strategies.

nodes.name: partition_prune.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for partition pruning, verifying that query planning eliminates irrelevant partitions based on constraints.

nodes.name: password.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for password authentication methods, covering md5, scram-sha-256, and password change operations.

nodes.name: path.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the path geometric data type, verifying open and closed path construction, operations, and conversions.

nodes.name: pg_lsn.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the pg_lsn (Log Sequence Number) data type, covering WAL position arithmetic and comparisons.

nodes.name: plancache.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the plan cache, verifying prepared statement re-planning behavior when schema changes invalidate cached plans.

nodes.name: plpgsql.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test suite for PL/pgSQL, covering control flow, exception handling, cursors, triggers, and dynamic SQL.

nodes.name: point.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the point geometric data type, covering construction, operators, distance calculations, and spatial operations.

nodes.name: polygon.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the polygon geometric data type, verifying construction, containment, intersection, and area calculations.

nodes.name: polymorphism.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for polymorphic functions and types (anyarray, anyelement, etc.), verifying type resolution and polymorphic aggregate behavior.

nodes.name: portals.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for cursor portals, covering DECLARE, FETCH, MOVE, and CLOSE operations with various cursor types and options.

nodes.name: portals_p2.sql
nodes.summary: Continuation of PostgreSQL cursor portal regression tests, covering additional cursor scenarios and edge cases from a second test process.

nodes.name: prepare.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for PREPARE and EXECUTE statements, verifying prepared query caching, parameter binding, and re-execution behavior.

nodes.name: prepared_xacts.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for two-phase commit (PREPARE TRANSACTION, COMMIT PREPARED, ROLLBACK PREPARED) and prepared transaction state.
